name: Tongfu Microelectronics Co.,Ltd
summary: Tongfu Microelectronics Co.,Ltd provides integrated circuit (IC) assembling and testing services to the semiconductor industry worldwide. It provides wafer-level, flip chip, flip chip interconnection, ball grid array, plastic qual flat no-lead and dual flat no-lead, small outline, small outline transistor, dual-in-line, transistor outline, and plastic single-in-line packaging series products. The company's products are used in AP/PA/BB/RFIC chips, wireless LAN, card, switch, power management, memory, and standard analog, etc.; package solution for applications in computing, gaming, and high bandwidth networking/communication devices; networking, memory, microprocessors, graphic processors, logic, and micro-controllers; and consumer products, automotive devices, and analog ICs. Its products are also used in wireless/RF and analog devices, portable products, data storage systems, notebook computers, and pagers; power supplies, converters and power motor controls, hand-held instruments, battery powered consumer products, etc.; and automotive consumer and communications products. The company was formerly known as Nantong Fujitsu Microelectronics Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tongfu Microelectronics Co.,Ltd in December 2016. Tongfu Microelectronics Co.,Ltd was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Nantong, China.
